description_long: This is a tall, slender, conical tube with a deep red color, designed for holding lotion. The front displays the brand 'Natura' and the product name 'Essencial Supreme' in gold and white text, along with a volume indication of 125 ml. The back of the tube is densely covered with product information and instructions in small gold text. The tube is made of a smooth, semi-glossy plastic material, with a rounded, flat base that allows it to stand upright. The cap is integrated into the base and is likely a screw-on or snap-on style, typical for squeeze tubes. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with minimal graphic elements aside from the logo and text.
description: A tall, deep red squeeze tube with gold and white branding, featuring a smooth, semi-glossy plastic finish and a flat, rounded base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the product name 'Essencial Supreme', brand 'Natura', and volume marking in gold and white text on a plain red background.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the tube's slim, conical profile with minimal visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: The back view displays dense gold text with product information and instructions, covering most of the surface.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the tube's narrow, conical shape with little visible detail.
